title: koeleria glauca
intro: Koeleria glauca, also known as blue fescue grass or blue koeleria, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Koeleria glauca include reducing inflammation, preventing infections, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Koeleria glauca can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, often used to treat various health conditions such as respiratory issues and digestive problems.
